fathom._help: Fathom transcript MCP. Defaults reflect the standard Fathom MCP (verified). Override namespace_prefix or tool names if your install differs. extra can hold a team filter, e.g. { team: 'Sales' }.

fireflies._help: Fireflies.ai transcript MCP. Provide the namespace_prefix (e.g. mcp__fireflies__) and the tool names that list recent meetings + fetch a transcript. Found during Stage 0 setup.

otter._help: Otter.ai transcript MCP. Provide the namespace_prefix and tool names during setup.

read_ai._help: Read AI meeting MCP. Provide the namespace_prefix and tool names during setup.

grain._help: Grain meeting MCP. Provide the namespace_prefix and tool names during setup.

notion_meeting_notes._help: Notion meeting notes DB (collection://...). Skill queries the DB for recent rows and pulls page content as the transcript.

other_mcp._help: Catch-all for any meeting transcript MCP not listed above (e.g. Granola, Avoma, Krisp, Gong, Zoom). service_name is the human-readable label. namespace_prefix is the MCP prefix like 'mcp__granola__'.

manual._help: Always available. User pastes transcript text, drops a file path, or uploads. save_folder optionally stores a copy as transcript-{date}.md.

business._help: shape: 'single brand' | 'multi-brand' | 'agency' | 'internal' | free text. project_taxonomy: 'client' | 'client+project' | 'project' | free text. active_projects_source: where the live list of active clients/projects lives (path or DB ID) — used to disambiguate which project a meeting is about.

project_state._help: master_path is the portfolio-level state file. project_state_pattern is a glob describing per-project state files, e.g. /path/to/{client}/{project}/state.yaml. Leave blank if you don't use project state files.

notion._help: Notion DB collection IDs. tasks_db_id holds individual tasks. project_dashboard_db_id holds projects/clients that tasks link to via relation. Leave both blank if you don't use Notion.

reclaim._help: Optional Reclaim integration. task_naming_convention is the format you use for task titles, with placeholders like {project}, {category}, {task}. Leave blank for default {project}: {task}.

dashboard._help: Optional dashboard regeneration command run after updates. Leave blank if not used.

task_defaults._help: priority_levels and categories follow your task system's conventions. categories are optional task tags.

team._help: Optional list of team member names so the skill can offer assignees during gap-clarification (Stage 3). Leave empty if you handle assignments yourself.

output_preferences._help: detail_level: 'concise' | 'standard' | 'detailed'. sections: any of attendees, decisions, completed, new_tasks, blockers, timeline, risks, open_questions, context, quotes. format: 'bullets' | 'mixed' | 'prose'. tone: 'neutral' | 'terse' | 'conversational'. save_path_template supports placeholders {project_path}, {client}, {project}, {date}. Leave blank to skip saving.
